description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, resembling a modern main battle tank with a low, angular profile. The exterior is covered in a green and brown camouflage pattern, with a large, centrally mounted turret featuring a long-barreled cannon. The hull is robust, with thick, sloped armor plating on all sides, and the vehicle rides on six large road wheels per side, encased in continuous tracks. The turret has visible hatches and periscopes, and there is a ladder affixed to the rear for crew access. The front and sides are reinforced, and the vehicle's design suggests a focus on both protection and firepower for urban or battlefield environments.
description: A camouflaged, heavily armored tracked tank with a large turret and long cannon, featuring sloped armor and robust tracks. The vehicle is designed for combat, with visible hatches, periscopes, and a rear ladder.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, six large road wheels, continuous tracks, and the turret with its long cannon.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped frontal armor, central cannon, and the wide, imposing stance of the vehicle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tracks, wheels, and turret details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back armor, rear access ladder, and the rear portion of the tracks and hull.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret roof; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; turret and hull both appear heavily reinforced.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage with irregular green and brown patches and some black accents.
